name: nirmiqlearn
description: A local-first learning OS that connects to your IDE. Log debug sessions, generate explain-back questions, map DSA concepts, and track daily learning — all inside Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf. Your data never leaves your machine.
author: Siddharth Prasad

steps: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate

tools.name: get_workspace_summary
tools.description: Get full summary of a workspace including questions, concepts, debug logs, and daily logs

tools.name: add_debug_log
tools.description: Log a debug session with error, root cause, and fix

tools.name: add_question
tools.description: Add an explain-back question to a workspace

tools.name: add_concept_link
tools.description: Link a DSA or CS concept to a workspace

tools.name: add_daily_log
tools.description: Log what you built, understood, and what is still unclear today

tools.name: get_weak_questions
tools.description: Surface explain-back questions you have been avoiding or not answered

tools.name: nirmiq_explain_command
tools.description: Explain a shell command in plain English and log it to the session log (what it does, why it ran, what it changes, risk level). Works without a key (basic static explanation); set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + NIRMIQ_PRO_KEY for AI-powered explanations.

tools.name: nirmiq_generate_questions
tools.description: AI: Generate 5 progressive explain-back questions from a code snippet (beginner to advanced). Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

tools.name: nirmiq_suggest_concepts
tools.description: AI: Identify 3-5 underlying DSA/CS concepts in a code snippet with 30-min practice tasks. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

tools.name: nirmiq_debug_assist
tools.description: AI: Analyse an error message and return root cause, top 3 checks, fix, and prevention rule. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

tools.name: nirmiq_analyze_project
tools.description: AI: Point NirmiqLearn at a project folder and get a full understanding breakdown — plain-English overview, simplified stack, architecture, key files, learning map, 10 explain-back questions, and 5 CS concepts. Creates and populates a workspace automatically. Requires NIRMIQ_PRO_KEY + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
